user.loginUser: SELECT * FROM security.users WHERE (users_name = $1 OR users_email = $1) AND users_password = $2;
user.verifyUser: SELECT * FROM security.users WHERE (users_name = $1 OR users_email = $1);
user.registerGeneralUser: INSERT INTO security.users (users_name, users_email, users_password, users_first_name, users_last_name, users_description, users_image) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7);
user.registerUser: INSERT INTO security.users (users_name, users_email, users_password, fk_profile_id, users_first_name, users_last_name, users_description, users_image) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8);
user.updatePassword: UPDATE security.users SET users_password = $1 WHERE (users_email = $2 OR users_name = $2);
user.deleteUser: DELETE FROM security.users WHERE users_name = $1 OR users_email = $1;
user.getUser: SELECT u.users_name, u.users_email FROM security.users AS u WHERE u.users_name = $1 OR u.users_email = $1;
user.getImageUser: SELECT u.users_image FROM security.users AS u WHERE u.users_name = $1 OR u.users_email = $1;
user.updateValue: UPDATE security.users SET users_{{var}} = $1 WHERE users_name = $2 OR users_email=$2;
user.getAllUsers: SELECT u.users_name, u.users_email, p.profile_name FROM security.users u JOIN security.profile p ON u.fk_profile_id = p.profile_id

tx.permsTxQuery: SELECT mp.fk_transaction_id AS tx_id, mp.fk_profile_id AS profile_id FROM security.method_permission AS mp;
tx.txQuery: SELECT t.transaction_id, m.method_name, o.object_name FROM security.transaction AS t INNER JOIN security.method AS m ON t.fk_method_id = m.method_id INNER JOIN security.object AS o ON m.fk_object_id = o.object_id;
tx.addTxPerms: INSERT INTO security.method_permission (fk_profile_id, fk_transaction_id) SELECT p.profile_id, t.transaction_id FROM security.profile p, security.transaction t WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM security.method_permission mp WHERE mp.fk_profile_id = p.profile_id AND mp.fk_transaction_id = t.transaction_id) AND p.profile_id = $1 AND t.transaction_id = $2;
tx.deleteTxPerms: DELETE FROM security.method_permission WHERE fk_profile_id = $1 AND fk_transaction_id = $2;

option.optionsQuery: SELECT op.option_id, op.option_name, op.option_function, op.option_params, op.option_async, op.option_generic, co.component_name FROM security.option AS op INNER JOIN security.component AS co On op.fk_component_id = co.component_id;
option.permsOptQuery: SELECT op.fk_option_id AS option_id, op.fk_profile_id AS profile_id FROM security.option_permission as op;
option.addOptPerms: INSERT INTO security.option_permission (fk_profile_id, fk_option_id) SELECT p.profile_id, o.option_id FROM security.profile p, security.option o WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM security.option_permission op WHERE op.fk_profile_id = p.profile_id AND op.fk_option_id = o.option_id) AND p.profile_id = $1 AND o.option_id = $2;
option.deleteOptPerms: DELETE FROM security.option_permission WHERE fk_profile_id = $1 AND fk_option_id = $2;

profile.getProfiles: SELECT profile_id AS id, profile_name AS name FROM security.profile;

whereIsThisUsed?.verifyDuplicate: SELECT u.users_name, u.users_email FROM security.users AS u WHERE u.users_name = $1 OR u.users_email = $2;

recipe.getAllRecipes: SELECT r.recipe_id, r.recipe_name, r.recipe_description, r.recipe_image, r.fk_users_name AS author, r.recipe_ingredients, r.recipe_steps FROM recipe.recipe AS r WHERE r.fk_users_name = $1;
recipe.getRecipe: SELECT r.recipe_id, r.recipe_name, r.recipe_description, r.recipe_image, r.fk_users_name AS author, r.recipe_ingredients, r.recipe_steps FROM recipe.recipe AS r WHERE r.recipe_id = $1;
recipe.addRecipe: INSERT INTO recipe.recipe (recipe_name, recipe_description, recipe_image, fk_users_name, recipe_ingredients, recipe_steps) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6);
recipe.deleteRecipe: DELETE FROM recipe.recipe WHERE recipe_id = $1 AND fk_users_name = $2;
recipe.updateRecipe: UPDATE recipe.recipe SET recipe_{{var}} = $1 where recipe_id = $2 AND fk_users_name = $3;
recipe.searchRecipes: SELECT r.recipe_id, r.recipe_name, r.recipe_description, r.recipe_image, r.fk_users_name AS author, r.recipe_ingredients, r.recipe_steps FROM recipe.recipe AS r WHERE r.recipe_name ILIKE $1 OR r.recipe_description ILIKE $1 OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM UNNEST(r.recipe_ingredients) AS ingredient WHERE ingredient ILIKE $1) ORDER BY r.recipe_name ASC

group.getAllGroups: SELECT g.recipe_group_id, g.recipe_group_name FROM recipe.recipe_group AS g WHERE g.fk_users_name = $1;
group.deleteGroup: DELETE FROM recipe.recipe_group WHERE recipe_group_id = $1 AND fk_users_name = $2;
group.updateGroup: UPDATE recipe.recipe_group SET recipe_group_name = $1 WHERE recipe_group_id = $2 AND fk_users_name = $3;

groupRecipe.removeRecipeFromGroup: DELETE FROM recipe.recipe_recipe_group WHERE fk_recipe_id = $1 AND fk_recipe_group_id = $2;
groupRecipe.deleteRecipesFromGroup: DELETE FROM recipe.recipe r WHERE r.fk_users_name = $1 AND r.recipe_id IN (SELECT rg.fk_recipe_id FROM recipe.recipe_recipe_group rg WHERE rg.fk_recipe_group_id = $2);
groupRecipe.getRecipesFromGroup: SELECT r.recipe_id, r.recipe_name, r.recipe_description, r.recipe_image, r.fk_users_name AS author, r.recipe_ingredients, r.recipe_steps FROM recipe.recipe AS r JOIN recipe.recipe_recipe_group AS rg ON r.recipe_id = rg.fk_recipe_id WHERE rg.fk_recipe_group_id = $1 AND r.fk_users_name = $2;
groupRecipe.getImageFirstRecipeFromGroup: SELECT COALESCE(r.recipe_image, 'https://jqzgaaxlmcfhcygnjlcd.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/infused/Default/defaultGroup.jpeg') AS recipe_image FROM recipe.recipe AS r JOIN recipe.recipe_recipe_group AS rg ON r.recipe_id = rg.fk_recipe_id WHERE rg.fk_recipe_group_id = $1 AND r.fk_users_name = $2 ORDER BY r.recipe_image IS NULL, r.recipe_id ASC LIMIT 1;

follow.unfollowUser: DELETE FROM recipe.follow WHERE fk_user_follower = $1 AND fk_user_followed = $2;
follow.getFollowers: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recipe.follow AS f WHERE f.fk_user_followed = $1;
follow.getFollowing: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recipe.follow AS f WHERE f.fk_user_follower = $1;
